text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O often makes a dramatic entrance,
even if its just to a training session.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, I'm awaiting her lively arrival, wondering
whether she'll be dancing or singing, when...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Good day, Trainer! And what a fine day it is!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's decided to wear her signature racewear.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ensnared by my charm, are you? I certainly can't
blame you for that.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Not after I spent the past two hours admiring my
regal self in the mirror.
choice_data_list:
Huh... So why'd you choose your racewear to
train in?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: For the sake of all involved in the race, of course!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I am far too dangerous when racing in these
clothes, for those who gaze upon me become lost
in a labyrinth of allure.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Like moths to the flame, my sweet fans are
inevitably drawn to tragedy—only once I have
crossed the finish line do they awaken.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: As such, what is there to be done? The answer is simple!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Before the race takes place, I shall allow them the
chance to grow accustomed to this visage!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Oh, I assure you, it can be done. After all, I am the culmination of all forms of beauty the world over!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This doesn't precisely explain why she's wearing
her racewear today, but I put that aside for the
moment.
choice_data_list: You sure like your signature racewear.
You sure like your signature racewear.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: But of course! This ensemble befits my splendor!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I'll show you... This way, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O suddenly sprints away, and I follow
after her.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Behold! These golden accessories—do they not
glisten in the sunlight?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh! My royal mantle, boldly fluttering in the
wind!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Wait for it!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I am eternal beauty, the light of the world, the
majesty of outer space...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I am the enrapturer of all—the Centurial
Overlord!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Has more perfect attire ever existed? Nay, this is a revolution! I have become a living piece of design history!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: And though this racewear's form is exquisite, one mustn't forget what lies at its source—a fabulous concept, that I created!
choice_data_list: You always know what you want.
You always know what you want.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, yes... It is a well-known fact that I make
every style look great.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: This one was designed to be most suitable for me.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Do you know why that is?
choice_data_list: It carries the air of the Overlord.
It depicts the strength to meet expectations.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! The same holds true of my noble mantle
and adornments! They comprise my throne when I
race!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Those who behold me striding down the turf do
not gaze in fear of my power. No!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: They gaze with envy and admiration!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
They may close their eyes, but I will still be
there—my burning figure afire in their hearts.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
However! Even if it brings them to their knees, I
only wish for my brilliance to leave them
reassured.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I will extend a hand of invitation to them—to walk
together toward a stage worthy of the Centurial
Overlord!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With how particular she is in her design, it's
obvious how strongly Opera O feels about her
racewear.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, yes, Trainer! You are but one of many with
great expectations of me.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Nay, to say "many" is an understatement. Is it not
obvious the entire world anticipates my coming
excellence?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Thus, I hereby declare, that I shall never betray
their expectations!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
This attire comprises my throne when I race! The
masses shall come to seek my beauty.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I say to them, come to the G1 caroling my name!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Come, and I shall greet you with more radiance
yet!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
For that is my duty—as the one who walks the
Overlord's path!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her enthusiasm is palpable. As her trainer, I'll do
everything I can to help make that dream come
true.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I've got it! I shall gift you an outfit as well, so you
might stand beside me!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Neither the sun nor moon can rise without the sky.
Thus, that is what you shall become! First, your
full body should have a base of sky blue...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I get the sense we're walking into dangerous
territory. I'd better stop her while we're ahead!
